framework.name: Instruction Interministerielle 901 - Protection of DR Information Systems
framework.name_nl: Instruction Interministerielle n 901 - Protection des systemes d'information Diffusion Restreinte
framework.issuing_body: Secretariat general de la defense et de la securite nationale (SGDSN)
framework.scope: Protection requirements for information systems handling Diffusion Restreinte (DR) classified information
framework.structure_description: Requirements for DR system homologation, physical security, access control, cryptographic protection, network architecture, maintenance, and incident handling.

controls.title: DR system homologation
controls.description: Every DR-level information system shall undergo a formal homologation process before processing classified information.
controls.description_nl: Tout systeme d'information de niveau DR doit faire l'objet d'un processus d'homologation formel avant de traiter de l'information classifiee.

controls.title: Security officer appointment
controls.description: A security officer shall be formally appointed and responsible for the DR system security throughout its lifecycle.
controls.description_nl: Un responsable de securite doit etre formellement nomme et responsable de la securite du systeme DR tout au long de son cycle de vie.

controls.title: Personnel security clearance
controls.description: All personnel accessing DR systems shall hold appropriate security clearance and have signed confidentiality agreements.
controls.description_nl: Tout le personnel accedant aux systemes DR doit detenir l'habilitation de securite appropriee et avoir signe des engagements de confidentialite.

controls.title: Physical security of DR systems
controls.description: DR systems shall be housed in controlled access areas with physical intrusion detection and access logging.
controls.description_nl: Les systemes DR doivent etre heberges dans des zones a acces controle avec detection d'intrusion physique et journalisation des acces.

controls.title: DR network encryption
controls.description: DR information transmitted over non-protected networks shall be encrypted using ANSSI-qualified cryptographic devices.
controls.description_nl: L'information DR transmise sur des reseaux non proteges doit etre chiffree en utilisant des dispositifs cryptographiques qualifies par l'ANSSI.

controls.title: DR system network isolation
controls.description: DR systems shall be physically or logically isolated from non-classified networks with controlled gateways.
controls.description_nl: Les systemes DR doivent etre physiquement ou logiquement isoles des reseaux non classifies avec des passerelles controlees.

controls.title: Approved cryptographic products
controls.description: Only ANSSI-qualified or approved cryptographic products shall be used for DR information protection.
controls.description_nl: Seuls les produits cryptographiques qualifies ou agrees par l'ANSSI doivent etre utilises pour la protection de l'information DR.

controls.title: DR media handling
controls.description: Removable media containing DR information shall be marked, inventoried, stored in safes, and securely destroyed at end of life.
controls.description_nl: Les supports amovibles contenant de l'information DR doivent etre marques, inventories, stockes dans des coffres et detruits de maniere securisee en fin de vie.

controls.title: DR system maintenance security
controls.title_nl: Securite de la maintenance des systemes DR
controls.description: Maintenance of DR systems shall be performed by cleared personnel with procedures to prevent information leakage.
controls.description_nl: La maintenance des systemes DR doit etre realisee par du personnel habilite avec des procedures pour prevenir les fuites d'information.

controls.title: DR incident response
controls.description: Security incidents on DR systems shall be immediately reported to the security officer and ANSSI through the chain of command.
controls.description_nl: Les incidents de securite sur les systemes DR doivent etre immediatement signales au responsable de securite et a l'ANSSI via la chaine hierarchique.

controls.title: DR system decommissioning
controls.title_nl: Mise hors service des systemes DR
controls.description: DR system decommissioning shall include certified data destruction and return of cryptographic equipment to ANSSI.
controls.description_nl: La mise hors service des systemes DR doit inclure la destruction certifiee des donnees et le retour des equipements cryptographiques a l'ANSSI.
